title: License gate: verify reuse terms before ingestion (open/PD/CC only); reject closed/ToS/controlled; share-alike lineage
context: The 'no closed/unlicensed source' refusal must be enforced before ingestion, not after. This safety-critical M3 task implements the license gate that verifies and records each source's reuse terms, rejects unknown/closed/paywalled/controlled-access/ToS-restricted sources (0-ingested target), and records share-alike (CC-BY-SA/ODbL) lineage so the synthesis license strategy can isolate and attribute share-alike sections.
objective: Implement the pre-ingestion license gate: verify and record each source's reuse terms before ingestion, reject unknown/closed/paywalled/controlled-access/ToS-restricted sources (test asserts 0 ingested), and record per-source license lineage including share-alike (CC-BY-SA/ODbL) while respecting robots/ToS for fetching.
acceptanceCriteria: Before ingestion, verifies and records each source's reuse terms; rejects unknown/closed/paywalled/controlled-access/ToS-restricted sources (test asserts 0 such sources ingested)
Records per-source license lineage incl. share-alike (CC-BY-SA/ODbL) so the synthesis license strategy can isolate/attribute share-alike sections; robots/ToS respected for fetching
Reviewed and signed off by the maintainer + gate reviewer (recorded)
